original_query: select s_acctbal, s_name, n_name, p_partkey, p_mfgr, s_address, s_phone, s_comment from part, supplier, partsupp, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and p_size = 6 and p_type like '%NICKEL' and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'EUROPE' and ps_supplycost = ( select min(ps_supplycost) from partsupp, supplier, nation, region where p_partkey = ps_partkey and s_suppkey = ps_suppkey and s_nationkey = n_nationkey and n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'EUROPE' ) order by s_acctbal desc, n_name, s_name, p_partkey limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_parts AS (
  SELECT p_partkey, p_mfgr
  FROM part
  WHERE p_size = 6 AND p_type LIKE '%NICKEL'
),
european_nations AS (
  SELECT n_nationkey, n_name
  FROM nation
  JOIN region ON n_regionkey = r_regionkey
  WHERE r_name = 'EUROPE'
),
european_suppliers AS (
  SELECT s_suppkey, s_name, s_address, s_phone, s_acctbal, s_comment, n_name, s_nationkey
  FROM supplier
  JOIN european_nations ON s_nationkey = n_nationkey
),
min_supplycost_per_part AS (
  SELECT 
    p_partkey, 
    MIN(ps_supplycost) AS min_ps_supplycost
  FROM partsupp
  JOIN european_suppliers ON ps_suppkey = s_suppkey
  JOIN filtered_parts ON ps_partkey = p_partkey
  GROUP BY p_partkey
)
SELECT 
  s.s_acctbal, 
  s.s_name, 
  s.n_name, 
  p.p_partkey, 
  p.p_mfgr, 
  s.s_address, 
  s.s_phone, 
  s.s_comment
FROM filtered_parts p
JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
JOIN european_suppliers s ON ps.ps_suppkey = s.s_suppkey
JOIN min_supplycost_per_part m ON p.p_partkey = m.p_partkey 
  AND ps.ps_supplycost = m.min_ps_supplycost
ORDER BY 
  s.s_acctbal DESC, 
  s.n_name, 
  s.s_name, 
  p.p_partkey
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replaced correlated subquery with CTEs to compute minimum supply cost per part only once
Pre-filtered European nations and suppliers using CTEs to reduce join sizes
Used explicit JOIN syntax instead of comma-separated tables in FROM clause
